Notice Of Motion For Order Allowing Filing Of First Amended Complaint (C.C.P. 472)
Off Calendar Jul-18-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
J. Kevin Morrison, Esq. 415-988-9828 of Altair Law for Plaintiff MANUEL VALENZUELA, TERRENCE COOKSEY.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF MANUEL VALENZUELA, TERRENCE COOKSEY'S Motion For Order Allowing Filing Of First Amended Complaint (C.C.P. 472).

Plaintiffs' motion for order allowing filing of first amended complaint is granted. All parties stipulated to the granting of the motion and no party filed any opposition to the motion.

Order is signed.(see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M.Goodman, Not Reported. =(302/HK)
